_publications._publicationTitle: Transplantation of miPSC/mESC-derived retinal ganglion cells into healthy and glaucomatous retinas.

_contextSnippet: leading to all neurons within the organoid being mCherry+ during late stages of differentiation...later all neurons are mCherry+
details: All neurons within the organoid were mCherry+ during late stages of differentiation, enabling uniform fluorescent labeling of all neurons generated within each organoid
